positive: A mystical forest silhouette against a vibrant nebula sky. Focus on bioluminescent flora and fauna, creating a highly stylized, graphic illustration with clean lines and strong, jewel-toned color contrast (deep blues, purples, emerald greens, and pops of neon yellow). The central composition features towering, abstract trees whose branches intertwine with crescent moons and floating constellations. The overall mood is ethereal and whimsical, suitable for a clean, high-contrast apparel print. Vector art aesthetic, maximalist composition, deep depth of field, award-winning fantasy illustration, highly detailed, flat graphic design elements.
